patterns.name: adapter-strangler
patterns.intent: Use PoB Lua as the correctness adapter, then replace modules with Rust only after parity.
patterns.use_when: Porting Dat64, bases, skills, mods, stat descriptions, or passive tree exporters.

patterns.name: raw-snapshot-plus-mapper
patterns.intent: Save raw rows first, then run independently testable mappers.
patterns.use_when: Adding any new game table or domain entity.

patterns.name: golden-diff
patterns.intent: Compare Rust output against PoB output for the same patch before enabling Rust as primary.
patterns.use_when: Replacing Lua extraction or domain transformation logic.

patterns.name: append-only-versioning
patterns.intent: Create a new extract version and diff instead of mutating history.

patterns.name: manifested-assets
patterns.intent: Copy referenced assets to local ignored storage and track metadata in DB.
patterns.use_when: Extracting icons, passive tree backgrounds, stat icons, or UI images.

patterns.name: mapper-registry
patterns.intent: Register domain mappers by table/entity type so mapper failures are isolated.
patterns.use_when: Normalizing raw DAT rows into item, skill, mod, stat, or passive entities.
